name: semiotics
description: this is the study of signs and symbols in communication and culture, a good tools for understanding meaning in our world at a deeper level.

name: phenomenology
description: it's the study of conscious experience, a fascinating dive into our unique human experience, also useful for improving concentration and learning skills.

name: AOC
description: it's astounding how someone so inarticulate can become a lawmaker of a world power, a springboard to understanding the shallownees of the American culture.

name: Trump
description: he's a typical American who excels in scamming people in order to make money, a 21st century authoritarian and clown so skilled in deception that he was able to remove the faux-ethical mask that Americans try to hide behind, revealing the corruption of the Democrats, the Republicans, and the American people as a whole.

name: Mormonism
description: this is a powerful American scam operation with an international sales force that uses two-on-one persuation tactics, gaslighting, and typical religious lying-in-your-face strategies in order to drive membership and keep people bamboozled and trapped as paying members inside the cult.

name: Rumman Chowdhury
description: she's a data scientist and former AI lead at Accenture, speaks on the future of AI.

name: Armin Ronacher
description: he is an Austrian open-source programmer who created the Python web framework Flask.
